meaning: n.[解] 血小板,小盘,小板
examples: A is antibacterial, insecticidal, and inhibitable to platelet-activating factor.
Thrombomodulin can entirely inhibit thrombin and ristocetin-induced platelet aggregation.
In some cases, adding a second anti-platelet drug to aspirin seemed to give extra protection.
Amgen just got another FDA panel vote, a unanimous recommendation of a treatment for platelet disorders.
